# NorthPaw

> Canada's pet community — find mates for your pet, adopt from local Calgary shelters, and shop from verified Canadian pet stores.

NorthPaw is a mobile-first pet app focused on Calgary, Alberta. It combines three experiences: pet mating (swipe-based matching), adoption listings from local shelters, and a marketplace of verified pet stores.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of NorthPaw's mating, adoption, and marketplace features.
- [Sign up](/signup): Create a NorthPaw account.
- [Log in](/login): Sign in to an existing account.
